subtitle.en: amethyst is quartz with Fe substituting for Si; natural radiation converts Fe³⁺ → Fe⁴⁺ + hole, the [FeO₄]⁰ centre absorbs yellow-green and the crystal looks deep purple
subtitle.ko: 자수정은 Si 자리에 Fe가 있는 수정 — 방사선이 [FeO₄]⁰ 형성, 황록 흡수로 자색

description.en: Hex crystal colour driven by dose and anneal T. Low T = amethyst purple; high T (>350 °C) = citrine orange. Reaction equation and ametrine boundary noted.
description.ko: Dose와 T가 6각 결정 색을 구동. 저T=자색 amethyst, 고T(>350°C)=주황 citrine. 반응식·ametrine 경계 설명.
